name: Wrodscapes
description: Playing Wordscapes 10 mins a day sharpens your mind and prepares you for your daily life and challenges! This text twist of a word game is tremendous brain challenging fun. Enjoy modern word puzzles with word searching, anagrams, and crosswords! Immerse yourself into the beautiful scenery backgrounds to relax and ease your mind.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
